description: Reared in Georgia and settled in North Carolina, Jake Xerxes Fussell has established himself as a devoted listener and contemplative interpreter of a vast array of folk songs, lovingly sourced from a personal store of favourites. On his latest album, When I’m Called, his first as a parent, Fussell returns to a well of music that holds lifelong sentimental meaning, loosely contemplating the passage of time and the procession of life’s unexpected offerings.
title: Jake Xerxes Fussell Concert
